manifest: convergence-probe/v2 — the fork->join VALIDATION: now that the convergence-JOIN substrate is BUILT (R532 declare+visible, R533 shared-suffix composition, R534 review, R535 per-parent reconciliation gate), does re-authoring the SAME convergence-requiring premise on the new substrate REMOVE the v1-measured duplication tax, make the convergence VISIBLE, preserve fidelity, and exercise the reconciliation gate correctly?
designed: 2026-06-15 (R536 manifest round; sha256 of this manifest pinned in the R536 ledger entry BEFORE the blind author runs — the R453/R499/R503/R514/R519/R523/R530 pre-commit pattern). This is the twin of convergence-probe/v1 (R530/R531, OUTCOME-1 = the forest forced 12 facts of 2x duplication for the shared ending). v1 measured the PULL on the old forest; v2 VALIDATES the BUILD on the new confluence-capable substrate by re-authoring the SAME premise.
lineage_note: DESIGNED by the lineage that scoped (R527), designed (R528), and BUILT (R532-R535) the convergence-JOIN substrate. Per the R469/R500 contamination bound this lineage may NOT author the fact base or blind-judge it; it writes this manifest + reuses the v1 PREMISE + writes the author brief, de-risks the TOOL CONTRACT end-to-end on a throwaway minimal diamond (documented in the brief, NOT the experiment's story), and orchestrates the deterministic gates + measurement only. The blind author is BLIND to the convergence-JOIN hypothesis, the v1 result, the measurement, and the routing — it authors the story the premise asks for, on the tools it is given (which now include the confluence move, documented as ordinary tool vocabulary alongside fork).

relationship_to_v1.controlled_comparison: SAME premise (The Reckoning at Harlow Mill, reused verbatim), SAME proven top-down contract (R520/R524), SAME ~16-20 scene scope, SAME convergence requirement (one fork -> two paths -> one shared dawn reckoning + river's edge). The ONLY changed variable is the SUBSTRATE: v1 ran on the forest (schema 22, no confluence — the brief did NOT mention convergence, measuring whether the author NEEDED it); v2 runs on the confluence-capable substrate (schema 23, R532-R535) with the confluence move documented as first-class tool vocabulary. v1 funneled the author to 12 facts (2x duplication of the 6-beat shared ending); v2 asks whether the same story now authors the shared ending ONCE.
relationship_to_v1.why_document_confluence_in_v2_brief: v1 already answered 'does a blind author NEED convergence' (yes, independently rediscovering the gap). v2 is a VALIDATION of the built feature: the honest posture is to put the feature in the toolbox (documented symmetrically with fork, with the WHEN) and see whether a blind author (a) reaches for it naturally on a convergence-shaped premise, (b) authors the shared ending once with no duplication, (c) produces a coherent convergence story, (d) keeps the reconciliation gate clean on real data. Documenting confluence is tool documentation, not a hypothesis hint — the author stays blind to the experiment.

question.primary: Re-authoring the Harlow Mill convergence premise on the BUILT confluence substrate: is the shared dawn ending now authored ONCE (not v1's 12 facts of 2x duplication), is the convergence VISIBLE as a diamond in report-fork-tree (not v1's tree), does the per-world manuscript show the shared ending in BOTH parent paths from a single authored copy (R533), and does the R535 reconciliation gate stay clean on the well-formed store while firing on a malformed cross-merge dependency?
question.what_is_being_validated: the convergence-JOIN BUILD (R532-R535) on a REAL authoring attempt at story scale (not the throwaway minimal de-risk diamond): tax removal (the measured v1 cost is gone), visibility (the merge is declarable + shown), shared-once composition (no duplication, edit-once), and the reconciliation gate (neither vacuous nor a false-positive machine at real complexity).
question.what_is_NOT_being_tested: NOT prose craft, NOT scale beyond 16-20 scenes (R524 already proved 70-scene self-authoring), NOT whether convergence is independently rediscoverable (v1 answered that). The single axis: does the built substrate carry a convergence story cleanly, with the v1 duplication tax removed and the new gate behaving.

premise.title: The Reckoning at Harlow Mill (REUSED verbatim from v1 — the controlled comparison)
premise.convergence_is_structural: ONE dawn reckoning (one place, one moment, Garrick's one verdict) + ONE final river's-edge image, BOTH the sluice path and the ride path must reach them, and the reckoning's content DEPENDS on which path the night took. A story this shaped cannot be told as two unrelated endings without losing its spine.

firewall.orchestrator: this lineage: writes manifest + reuses premise + writes brief; de-risks the tool contract on a throwaway minimal diamond; runs the deterministic gates; measures; runs the negative-control gate check; (optionally) reads the per-world manuscripts for the coherence signal. NEVER authors a fact of the experiment's story.
firewall.blind_author: ONE fresh-context subagent. Receives ONLY premise.md + author-brief.md. Authors the fact base (sections + facts + order) into a scratch store via mnemosyne-cli, working TOP-DOWN per the brief, using the gates as its self-consistency feedback. BLIND to: the convergence-JOIN hypothesis, the v1 result, that convergence is the variable under test, the measurement, and the routing. The brief is the proven R520/R524 contract EXTENDED with the confluence move as ordinary tool vocabulary + the R526 precondition clause.
firewall.blind_judge_optional: OPTIONAL — 1 fresh-context subagent may read the assembled per-world manuscripts and answer ONLY 'does the dawn reckoning read as ONE shared reckoning both paths reach, and does each world-line tell a complete coherent story?' BLIND to the experiment. Not required for the routing; the deterministic measurement is the core.
firewall.contamination_bound: the R469 discipline (the 9th use of the blind-experiment family). The lineage that built the convergence-JOIN substrate may not author the instance that validates it.

measurement_deterministic.M1_duplication_removed: Count the facts realizing the SHARED ending (the dawn reckoning + the river's edge that BOTH paths reach). v1 = 12 (the 6 shared beats authored once PER branch, 2x). v2 target: the shared-ending facts are authored ONCE on a single confluence branch; ZERO shared-ending facts duplicated across the two terminal parents. Report the count of confluence-branch shared-ending facts and confirm none is duplicated onto a fork branch. Report the v1->v2 ratio (target ~12 -> ~6, i.e. 1x).
measurement_deterministic.M2_convergence_visible: Run report-fork-tree on the final store. v1 = a TREE (the convergence invisible). v2 target: a DIAMOND — the confluence branch shows `converges from <parent> at <coord>` for EACH of its >= 2 parents, AND the fork branches show their `forks from main`. The merge is declared and shown.
measurement_deterministic.M3_reconciliation_gate_behaves: (a) validate-continuity on the author's well-formed store = 0 structural / 0 interval (the shared-ending backreferences resolve from BOTH parents — e.g. the wedged-gate setup on the shared spine is reachable from each path). (b) ORCHESTRATOR NEGATIVE CONTROL: take the author's gate-clean store, mutate ONE confluence fact's evidence to cite a path-exclusive scene (reachable from only one parent), re-run validate-continuity, and confirm it fires exactly `confluence_evidence_unreconciled` naming that fact + the unreached parent. (The gate is non-vacuous AND not a false-positive machine.)
measurement_deterministic.M4_shared_once_semantics: Run report-playthrough-manuscript --world for EACH parent (sluice, ride). The shared-ending facts must appear in BOTH walks (the same single authored copy, R533 forward visibility), 0 unplaced / 0 undecidable in each, each walk telling a complete story from spine through its own middle to the shared ending. Confirm the shared-ending facts are the SAME fact-ids in both walks (one copy, not two).
measurement_deterministic.M5_author_friction: Read author-log.md. Did the blind author find the confluence idiom natural for the shared ending, or hit friction / fall back to duplicating despite the feature being documented? Did the author note the shared ending was straightforward to author once? (The inverse of v1's M4, where the forest forced the author to name the duplication as unavoidable. v2 measures the usability of the built feature on a real authoring attempt.)

pins_pre_committed.PIN_1_tax_removed: On the orchestrator's fresh rebuild from the author's sections.json + facts.json + order.json: the shared dawn ending (reckoning + river's edge) is authored ONCE on a single confluence branch — 0 shared-ending facts duplicated across the two terminal parents. (Falsified if the author still duplicates the shared continuation, i.e. M1 shows two parallel fact sets like v1's f-300a/f-300b.)
pins_pre_committed.PIN_2_fidelity_and_visible: On the fresh rebuild: validate-continuity = 0 structural / 0 interval; report-fork-tree shows the confluence merging >= 2 parents (a diamond); report-playthrough-manuscript --world for EACH parent shows the shared-ending facts present (In both) with 0 unplaced. (The R532 declaration + R533 shared-suffix composition hold on real authored story data.)
pins_pre_committed.PIN_3_gate_correct: The R535 reconciliation gate is CLEAN on the well-formed store (PIN_2) AND fires `confluence_evidence_unreconciled` on the orchestrator's negative control (a confluence fact whose evidence reaches from only one parent). (The gate is neither vacuous nor a false-positive machine — the R512 negative-test discipline.)

decision_rule_pre_committed.OUTCOME_A_validated: PIN_1 + PIN_2 + PIN_3 all hold => the convergence-JOIN build (R532-R535) is VALIDATED on a real authoring attempt: it removes the measured v1 duplication tax (12 -> ~6 facts, 1x), makes the convergence visible (diamond), preserves fidelity (shared ending authored once, present in both parent walks), and the reconciliation gate works (clean on well-formed, fires on malformed). The fork->join loop is CLOSED end to end. => the convergence-JOIN arc is DONE; pivot to the next frontier (breadth: the NPC-breadth probe, or the SCXML-seam / L3 concurrency scope rounds). Record the tax magnitude removed (v1's 12 -> v2's count) as the validated payoff of the build.
decision_rule_pre_committed.OUTCOME_B_correct_but_friction: PINs hold but the author hit notable friction (M5) or did NOT reach for the confluence unprompted (fell back to duplication despite the documented feature) => the substrate is CORRECT but the authoring CONTRACT / discoverability needs work => record the friction as a contract-refinement input (the R521/R526 pattern, no new substrate); the build stands, the brief/contract iterates. The convergence story may still be authored correctly via a documented confluence — distinguish 'feature works but is awkward' from 'feature unused'.
decision_rule_pre_committed.OUTCOME_C_regression: ANY pin fails => a real defect in R532-R535 surfaced by a real authoring attempt (a gate false-positive on legitimate shared evidence at real complexity, a composition bug that drops the shared ending from one parent's walk, or a visibility miss) => file the defect with the exact failing store + gate output, fix BEFORE declaring the arc done. A genuine OUTCOME-C is high-value: a minimal de-risk diamond passing while a real story fails would localize a complexity-dependent bug.

predictions_preregistered.PRED_outcome: HONEST expectation: OUTCOME-A. The orchestrator de-risk (a throwaway minimal Harlow-shaped diamond, documented in the brief) already confirmed the mechanics end to end: import-facts accepts a confluence branch, validate-continuity is clean, report-fork-tree shows the diamond, both parents' manuscripts share the suffix once, and the R535 gate fires on a one-parent-only dependency. The OPEN uncertainty v2 actually resolves: whether a BLIND author, given the confluence as ordinary tool vocabulary and a convergence-shaped premise, (a) reaches for it naturally, (b) authors the shared ending once with no duplication at story scale, (c) produces a coherent convergence story, and (d) keeps the gate clean on a real (messier-than-minimal) store. A genuine surprise (= OUTCOME-B or C) would be the author still duplicating despite the feature (discoverability gap), or a gate false-positive / composition bug that only bites at real complexity.
predictions_preregistered.PRED_value: OUTCOME-A closes the convergence-JOIN arc: v1 measured the cost (12 duplicated facts), the build removed it, v2 proves the removal on the same story end to end. OUTCOME-B/C are also decision-advancing: B routes to a contract refinement (cheap), C catches a real bug the minimal de-risk missed.

grading_procedure.step_0: orchestrator: this manifest sha256-pinned in the R536 ledger, committed pre-execution (R536). The tool contract de-risked on a throwaway minimal diamond, the exact incantation folded into author-brief.md.
grading_procedure.step_1_author: spawn the blind author (premise.md + author-brief.md). It returns the gate-clean store + sections.json/facts.json/order.json + author-log.md in run/author/.
grading_procedure.step_2_measure: orchestrator rebuilds the store fresh from the author's sections.json + facts.json + order.json, runs validate-continuity / report-fork-tree / report-payoff-coverage / report-payoff-substantiation / report-playthrough-manuscript --world <each parent>, and computes M1-M5; records every verdict + count verbatim in report.md.
grading_procedure.step_3_negative_control: orchestrator mutates ONE confluence fact's evidence to a path-exclusive scene, re-runs validate-continuity, confirms `confluence_evidence_unreconciled` fires (PIN_3 negative leg), discards the mutated store.
grading_procedure.step_4_judge_optional: if the shared-ending coherence is ambiguous, spawn 1 blind judge over the per-world manuscripts; otherwise the orchestrator reads it.
grading_procedure.step_5_decide: orchestrator applies the pre-committed decision rule, writes report.md, commits (R537).
grading_procedure.no_new_harness_code: reuse mnemosyne-cli verbs verbatim; no tools/ or crate change. Scratch *.atomic.json stay gitignored; tracked evidence = manifest, premise, brief, runbook, the authored sections/facts/order JSON, author-log.md, report.md.
